name: Friendship Bread
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Fresh or canned fruit, washed and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the Amish Batter, oil, eggs, flour, sugar, cinnamon, salt, baking soda, baking powder, and vanilla until well combined.
2. Add the fresh or canned fruit to the mixture and stir until evenly distributed.
3. Grease two loaf pans with cooking spray or butter.
4. Pour the batter into the prepared pans.
5. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 50-60 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center of the bread comes out clean.
6. Allow the bread to cool in the pans for 10 minutes before removing and transferring to a wire rack to cool completely.
